text: A “traffic violator school branch or classroom location” is any place where a traffic violator school conducts instruction or maintains records.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 626.2

A “traffic violator school branch or classroom location” is any place where a traffic violator school conducts instruction or maintains records.

*(Added by Stats. 1985, Ch. 396, Sec. 2. Effective July 30, 1985.)*

subsections.text: A “traffic violator school branch or classroom location” is any place where a traffic violator school conducts instruction or maintains records.
